data.title: Xing Lu
data.synopsis:
Under the grand strategy of interstellar travel, humanity has entered the space age, but simultaneously faces the threat of UMA, a high-dimensional extraterrestrial life form from Ganymede, a being capable of devouring human consciousness and evolving itself. Xu Xinghe, a bright student who should be pursuing higher education, witnesses his brother being devoured by the alien creature, awakens special abilities, and embarks on a journey to find his brother's consciousness and fight against UMA. Along the way, he partners with the mysterious girl Jiang Yao, and the fate of humanity and UMA is about to reach a major turning point.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Pilgrim
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Pilgrim by RIM.

titles.title: It Starts with a Kingpin Account

data.title: Kaiju Jiu You Wangzhe Zhanghao
title_synonyms: It Starts with a Kingpin Account
data.synopsis:
In 2063, Earth enters the gaming era. Young Ye Hao awakens a legendary account, turning the tide for his family, defeating powerful monsters from another world, winning the heart of a young girl, and ultimately stopping a world-destroying conspiracy to protect his family.

(Source: Yuewen YouTube Channel)
data.background: Adaptation of chusan and Er Shuai's (二帅) Chinese webtoon of the same title.

data.title: Zhi Jia Yi
data.synopsis:
It tells the story of the heroine Tao Mengyan who returned to the mysterious village of Zangling in her dream to find the truth in order to resolve her nightmare. The village still retains the strange custom of worshiping "paper brides". Tao Mengyan, who was chosen as the "paper bride", experienced a life-and-death experience in Zangling Village, and finally solved the mystery of her past life and learned the thousand-year-old historical truth of the "Zangzun" belief in Zangling Village.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Xue Zhong Han Dao Xing
data.synopsis:
After a three-year, six-thousand-mile odyssey, Xu Fengnian, the world's most dissolute playboy, returns to Beiliang. Facing his father, Xu Xiao, he realizes that the Northern Liang sword will ultimately be his own. This time, his servant, Old Huang, offers his life as a token of his loyalty, respectfully inviting the prince into the martial arts world. Xu Fengnian no longer hides his power, but boldly draws his sword, facing the dual threat of the imperial court and the martial arts world, realizing his master plan and gradually uncovering the truth behind his mother, Wu Su's, death.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Fenghuo Xi Zhuhou's (烽火戏诸侯) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Wangzhe Rongyao: Rongyao Zhi Zhang - Baozang Pian
王者荣耀：荣耀之章 宝藏篇

data.title: Wangzhe Rongyao: Rongyao Zhi Zhang - Baozang Pian
data.title_japanese: 王者荣耀：荣耀之章 宝藏篇
data.synopsis:
Bounty hunter Marco Polo wanders the Kingdom of Kings and happens to take in Luban No. 7, a mechanical manipulator separated from Master Luban. To retrieve the "Tuling Treasure Box" tucked away in Luban No. 7, Marco accompanies Luban No. 7 on a quest to find Master Luban's family. However, they fall prey to an enemy conspiracy. From the Cloud Desert to the underground city of Chang'an, the two, having forged a deep friendship, face even more formidable challenges together.

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

data.title: Dadao Zhishang
data.synopsis:
It combines folklore, strange stories, cultivation system and suspense and conspiracy to construct a world where ghosts and gods are rampant and ancient and strange are intertwined. The work is characterized by the unique "oriental mystery".

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Zhai Zhu's (宅猪) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Qing Shan
data.synopsis:
After being confined to Qingshan Mental Hospital, the gifted young man Chen Ji kills the enemy who killed his parents. He then accidentally travels back in time to the ancient world and becomes an apprentice at the Ning Dynasty Medical Clinic. Involved in a case involving the Secret Service, he becomes a non-staff member of the agency, only to discover he's also a spy for the enemy nation. The story revolves around this dual identity. Trapped in the maelstrom of power, Chen Ji secretly fights for survival, using modern knowledge to deconstruct spiritual cultivation systems and maneuvering to overturn the chessboard. Ultimately, he transforms from pawn to master, wielding the Qingshan Mountains as his blade, vowing to shatter the hypocrisy of heaven!

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)
data.background: Adaptation based on a Chinese web novel of the same name, written by Hui Shuohua De Zhouzi (会说话的肘子).

titles.title: Qing Jiao Wo Gui Chai Daren

data.title: Qing Jiao Wo Gui Chai Daren
data.synopsis:
A perpetual night of catastrophe, terror descends, and strange phenomena abound! A young man, Wang Ye, is inexplicably chosen by the "Mysterious Post Office" to serve as a "ghost messenger," awakening his special powers and repeatedly embroiling himself in dangerous and paranormal phenomena. Witness how Wang Ye pushes the envelope, dispelling the mysteries and igniting the flames of humanity's survival amidst the terrifying darkness.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Xu Er Jia de Mao's (徐二家的猫) web novel, Qing Jiao Wo Gui Chai Daren (请叫我鬼差大人).

data.title: Shenmi Fusu
data.synopsis:
"My name is Yang Jian, and by the time you read this, I'll be dead." Ordinary student Yang Jian is caught up in a bizarre invasion, acquiring parchment from the future and a mysterious eye, becoming a ghost wielder. Yang Jian and his classmates escape the campus, but the crisis is just beginning. In this sinister world, the human world is a prison. The price of peering into darkness is eternal loss amidst endless wonder.

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

data.title: Tiancai Julebu
data.synopsis:
It uses a changing world line to make forward-looking reflections on the technological explosion, integrates intellectual games into urban legends, and opens up a new realm of "intellectual battle literature".

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Tian Wai Zhi Men
data.synopsis:
The Tianyan Kingdom possesses twelve of the most powerful weapons in the world, known as the "Twelve Divine Cores." Bai Meng, a female soldier with exceptional strength, is exceptionally chosen to possess one of the Dragon-Patterned Divine Cores, but is treated as a mere ornament due to societal prejudice. Bai Meng is ordered to the Haiyue Kingdom to participate in a martial arts festival, hoping to prove herself, but unexpectedly becomes a murderer, and her Divine Core is "absorbed" and stolen by the local leader, Duan Tian! 

To clear her name and retrieve the Divine Core, Bai Meng engages in a battle of wits and courage with Duan Tian, ​​unfolding a series of thrilling life-or-death struggles, only to discover an even greater conspiracy hidden behind it all… In this treacherous world, who is the pawn, and who is the player? When survival hangs in the balance, where will their differing beliefs lead them?

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Break the Music
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Break the Music by Vau Boy and S3RL.

titles.title: Yowaki Max Reijou nanoni, Ratsuwan Konyakusha-sama no Kake ni Notte Shimatta
Even Though I'm a Super Timid Noble Girl
I Accepted the Bet From My Cunning Fiancé
弱気MAX令嬢なのに、辣腕婚約者様の賭けに乗ってしまった

data.title: Yowaki Max Reijou nanoni, Ratsuwan Konyakusha-sama no Kake ni Notte Shimatta
data.title_japanese: 弱気MAX令嬢なのに、辣腕婚約者様の賭けに乗ってしまった
title_synonyms: Even Though I'm a Super Timid Noble Girl
I Accepted the Bet From My Cunning Fiancé
data.synopsis:
I was reborn as a villainous daughter in a reverse harem otome game.

After being sick with a high fever at the age of 10, Pia Rockwell suddenly remembered her past life as a university student in Japan. But far from going down the villainess route, all this super timid girl wants is to finally use her knowledge from when she was a grad student studying to get her doctorate in paleontology. Her ultimate goal is to become a commoner, excavate fossils, build a museum, and then become a curator.

So in order to escape the villainess route and avoid being deported by her fiancé during the graduation ball, Pia decides to avoid the upcoming hurt and heartache and asks to break off her engagement to Rufus, the Prime Minister's son.

But will her cunning fiancé let her go that easily?

(Source: MU)

data.title: Spec!
data.synopsis: Music video for the song SPEC! by sanetii.
